title: `--storage-opt imagestore` isn't respected
body:
### Issue Description

I tried setting this storage-opt flag but only lock files (no images) appear in the given directory. Do I misunderstand what this storage option is supposed to do?

### Steps to reproduce the issue

```bash
mkdir /tmp/foo
podman --storage-opt imagestore=/tmp/foo pull alpine
```
Looking inside the imagestore `ls /tmp/foo/*`
```
/tmp/foo/overlay-images:
images.lock

/tmp/foo/overlay-layers:
layers.lock
```
There's no images.

### Describe the results you received

No images in the store

### Describe the results you expected

Images in the store

### podman info output
